deployment_guide:
DEPLOYMENT GUIDE — APEX Detection Package apex-pkg-20260525T182705Z
1. Sentinel: Import apex-sentinel-arm-template.json via ARM deployment
2. Splunk: Import apex-splunk-content-bundle.json via ES Content Manager
3. YARA: Deploy apex-yara-rules.yar to CrowdStrike/CarbonBlack/Velociraptor
4. Suricata: Copy apex-suricata.rules to /etc/suricata/rules/ and reload
5. Sigma: Use sigma-cli to convert to target SIEM format
